title: Walamo Jehova Nyasaye
lyrics:
1. Walamo Jehova Nyasaye,
Walamoi, Yesu Kristo,
Kod Roho Maler mar Ruodhwa,
Hera margi duong' ahinya.

2. Walamo Wuonwa gi Roho,
Omiwa chiemo mar chunywa,
Kodi gik moko mabeyo,
Wamiyogi duong' tinende.

3. Walamoi, Yesu Kristo,
Nisethonwa e Kalwari,
Iluoko chunywa gi rembi,
Wamiyoi duong' tinende.

4. To Roho Maler mar Nyasaye,
Manyisowa richo duto
Odwaro nyisowa Nyasaye,
Wamiyoi duong' tinende.

title: Un Duto Joma Dak e Piny
Nyasaye Maduong'
lyrics:
1. Nyasaye maduong' in kendi e Ruoth
Nichiwo Ruoth Yesu Wuodi mihero:
Modoko misango kuom richo duto,
Mond' oyaw yor Polo ni ji duto te.

Chorus:
Pakuru Nyasachwa, Piny duto opake.
Pakuru Nyasachwa, Nyinge mond' oyud duong'.
Biuru ir Nyasaye kuom yie Yesu,
Miyeuru duong' Nyasachwa maduong'.

2. Warruok mwaseyudo en tich mar Nyasaye,
Ni ng'ato ka ng'ato moyie Yesu.
Ng'at moyie Yesu oyudo warruok
Richone duto te owene chutho.

3. Ruoth osepuonjowa weche mag polo
Momiyo wabet gi mor kuom Ruoth Yesu.
Osemiyowa teko mar bet kode,
Kendo en notelnwa ndalo duto te.

title: Denduru Ruodhwa
lyrics:
1. Denduru Ruodhwa maduong' malo,
Kuwer kodi mor, herane to duong'
En e Jarit marwa nyaka nene chon
Betne oler chutho ma duto opake.

2. Hulie tekone, nyis ji ng'wonone,
En e Chieng' mar piny, maloyo duto.
Mirimbe to duong' ka mor mar polo,
To jo moyie e molong'one adier.

3. Ditamwa hulo hawi man kuomwa,
Osemiyowa mwachando pile,
Ng'wonone ni kodwa ndalo ka ndalo,
Koro wakulore e nyime kwalame.

4. Wan dhano mar piny ma onge teko,
In e mwageni ok iweyowa:
Kuom Yesu Kristo iyiewa koro,
Rembe omiyo wasudo kwalamoi.

title: Anawer Wende Malong'o
lyrics:
1. Anawer wende malong'o
Kuom Yesu ma nothona,
Noweyo duong'ne e Polo
Mond' otho e Kalwari.

Chorus:
Anawer wende miwuoro
Kuom Kristo ma nothona,
Weruru, jo maler duto
Man e Polo gi piny te.

2. Ka nalal, Yesu nonwang'a
Kaka rombo morwenyo,
Gi hera maber moloyo
Ma noduoga e yore.

3. Jawarna nowara chutho
Kuom richo ma noloya,
Naketho, luoro nomaka,
To noresa kuom duto.

4. Chandruok pod obiro kuoma
Kaneno chuny lit bende,
To Jawarna ok oweya,
Ohoya maber pile.

title: Wapaki Nyasaye
lyrics:
1. Wapaki Nyasaye kuom Wuodi mihero,
Kuom Yesu Motho, Mochier, Modhi e Polo.

Chorus:
Halleluya! duong' mari, Halleluya amen.
Halleluya! duong' mari, Jiwowa koro.

2. Wapaki Nyasaye nikech Roho Maler,
Monyisowa Jawarwa Magolo mudho.

3. Pak kodi duong' kuom Nyarombo Nyasaye
Moseting'o richowa, Moluokwa mapoth.

4. Jiwowa kendo, pong' chunywa gi hera
Mondo tichwa omoko gi mach mar Polo.

title: Nyinge Ni Duong'!
An Apake
lyrics:
1. Ka nawinjo Soko nochwer,
Mar luoko richo duto,
Nayie Roho kopenja,
Idwaro doko maler?

Chorus:
An apake! An apake!
Yesu ma notho kuomwa;
Pakeuru un mong'eyo,
Ni rembe e moluoko richo.

2. Kata yorni obet madiny,
Gik ma yande nahero,
Duong' kodi ber mar pinyni,
Akwano ka gin nono.

3. Mach mar Nyasaye e mopwodha,
Mojiwo chunya koro,
Ok naweyo pako Nyinge,
Duong' obedne pile.

4. Duong' nobed ni Nying Yesu!
Amor nikech herane.
Moweyona richo duto,
Moluoko chunya maler.

5. Duong', duong' ni kuom Wuoro!
Duong', duong' ni Wuode!
Duong', duong' ni kuom Roho!
Gin adek to gin achiel!

title: Neuru En Omiyo
lyrics:
1. Neuru En emomiyo ji teko mar loyo lueny,
Gari mare huyo malo e kor boche mag Polo.
Malaika man e Polo giluongo nyinge ni Ruoth;
Kwaruake e chunywa koro wanamor ma nyaka chieng'.

2. En ng'awano ma nomiyo ji duto mapako En,
En Yesu, ma Wuod Nyasaye, En Yesu Ruodhwa maber.
Nochandorenwa mokuongo, nyaka nothonwa e Yath.
Thone nogo en Owuongo noriembonwa tho chutho.

3. Nochiko jogo makwaye, En nobi omigi gweth.
Noidho e Polo malo, ne ginene kak' odhi.
E piny ka notimo duto ma Nyasaye nochike.
Tichne e piny ka norumo, enodok e i Polo.

4. Kawuono En e Jadolo, wanadonjo gi rembe.
Jogo maler ma nokwaye En ong'won owinjogi,
En ochikowa kamano En ogolo richowa.
Nyasaye noyie mondo othonwa kuom richowa.

5. E ringre ma nogur e Yath, ema nochwero remo,
E kuome wayudo hawi wadoko nyithind Nyasaye,
Nyasaye obedo malo En kanyachiel gi joge.
Kayie Ruodhwa mokwongo anadonji e Polo.

title: Alleluya! Yesu Ruodhwa!
lyrics:
1. Alleluya! Yesu Ruodhwa! Werneuru wer mamit:
Alleluya! En moloyo, En moloyo En Owuon.
To winjuru wende Polo, Ka ji wero wer mamor:
"Yesu e mowaro duto, Rembe e mogudowa."

2. Alleluya! Ok iwewa Kaka kiye dong' malit:
Alleluya! Intie butwa, Wan wayie chutho ma.
Kata en nodok e Polo, Ka noa e piny kucha,
En nosingore kamano, "Nyaka chieng' abet kod in."

3. Alleluya! Cham me Polo, In misirowa e piny:
Alleluya! In mikonyo Jo maricho duto ka:
In milamonwa e Polo, Wan wahombi, ng'wononwa,
Terwa ka malong'o malo, Ka maler e nyimi cha.

4. Alleluya! Yesu Ruodhwa! Werneuru wer mamit:
Alleluya! En moloyo, En moloyo en owuon.
To winjuru wende Polo, Ka ji wero wer mamor:
"Yesu e mowaro duto Rembe e mogudowa."

title: Moyawo Yo Madhi
lyrics:
1. Oganda jopolo wero kech mar Nyasaye kuom Joge,
Pi mar soko no mar ng'wono oketo wer e chunya,
Chunya wero ni Ruoth Wende pak kahulo ng'wonone maduong'
Moyawo yo madhi dala ni tieng'no ma nobayo.

2. Aparo herani maduong' miya bet nyathi Nyasaye,
Lwetino matiyo kuoma nochopa e singruokni,
Ruoth miya hulo kuom Misangoni misetimo kuom Yesu,
Moyawo yo madhi dala ni tieng'no ma nobayo.

3. An jagop wach mar Warruokni ka ok a hule ni ji.
Kechni koro otue chunje e lojno mar ng'wononi,
Kama niora Ruoth itelna' yo, miya chir aland wecheni,
Moyawo yo madhi dala ni tieng'no ma nobayo.

title: Chieng' Mar Chunya
lyrics:
1. Ruoth in e chieng' mar ngimana,
Jawarna maber mahero,
Otieno mudho ongena
Ka in buta Ruodha Yesu.

2. Ka nindo koro teroa,
Pong' parona kod kuwe mari
Mondo ayud nindo mokuwe
Ebwo herani mosiko.

3. Bed koda Ruodha mahero
Otieno kendo e odiechieng
Kik abedi mabor kodi
Kabet kodi en ngima adier

4. Kaka nyathi mayom adier
Adwaro hochni pile Ruoth
Maka gi lweti mar ng'wono
Awinj ka lweti miya hoch.

5. Ji matuo oyud kweni;
Ji modhier one ng'wononi,
To ji mayuak oyud hochni
Duto oyud nindo maber.

6. Okinyi ka piny orunwa
Wasud iri kama intie
Kwadonj' e piny mosekoru
Wabed e lweti mar konyruok.

title: Chunya Pak Ruoth Yesu Kristo
lyrics:
1. Chunya pak Ruoth Yesu Kristo,
Napodh nyime ka apake;
Ong'wonona ochangoa,
Momiya warruok maduong'.
Anapake, Anapake,
Kuom warruokne man gi gweth.

2. Anapake kamiye duong',
Nikech noloyonwa lweny;
Anapake, mak adok chien,
Nikech nohera adier.
Anapake, Anapake,
Nikech herane maduong'.

3. Oritowa wan nyithinde,
Ong'eyowa moloyo;
Otayowa ka wawuotho,
Oriembonwa wasikwa.
Anapake, Anapake,
Kuonde duto madhiye.

4. Malaika bende pake,
Kagirango wang' Yesu;
Wan bende chieng' ma wanachier
Wanapake kanyakla.
Wanapake, Wanapake,
Nikech ng'wonone maduong'.

title: En Wach Maduong'
lyrics:
1. En wach maduong' mawuoro ahinya
Ka Ruodha Yesu noyie tho kuoma.
Ne gigure e yath rembe nochwer
Mar luoko richona ka yie kuome.
Hera mar Nyasaye moloyo richona gi duong'
Nonyisore ratiro ka nochiwo Ruoth Yesu.
Hera maduong' kod ng'wonone
Nofwenyore ka notho kuoma.

2. Remb Kristo man gi teko maduong'
Nochwerna e wi Yath mar Kalwari.
Tiend wachni ok anyal nge'yo chuth
Ka Nyasaye nochiwe mond' othona
Kata chwechne duto man e Polo wuoro te
Kaka Kristo ne nyalo kawo kit dhano ka an.
Mond' owara kuom ng'wonone
Konyiso hera maduong' chutho.

3. Ne oweyo duong'ne e Polo
Kar dak maber ma onge maromogo,
Nikech an noweyo duong' Polo.
Ni mondo othona e Kalwari
Nonyiso herane gi ng'wonone adiera
Kochiwo ngimane ni mondo ayudi warruok.
Warruok maduong' kuom ng'wonone
Manogonya ae twech richo.

4. Chunya nokuyo ei twech richo
Richo kod mudho nopong' dhood chunya
Nyaka ler mar Ruoth nofwenyore.
Mayudo thuolo kod ler e chunya
Koro apako ng'wonone maduong' kuoma
Mogonya kendo gola ae twech mar richo
Osegonya koro amor
Momiya bedo thuolo chutho.

5. Bura koro ok oloya kendo
Abedo mar Ruoth Yesu to en mara.
En e wiya to an e ringre
Osepong'a kod adiera mare
Koro an gi chir mar chopo e kom duong' maler
Kuom Yesu aserwako osimbo ma nyaka chieng'
An ok aluor bedo bute
Nikech Ruoth Yesu osewara.

title: Duong' ni Nying Yesu
lyrics:
1. Duong' ni Nying Yesu Kristo! Jomalaika dende;
Keturu osimbo kuome, Kwatime Ruoth chutho.
Keturu osimbo kuome, Kwatime Ruoth chutho.

2. Ji mag ogendini duto Modak e piny ngima,
Miyeuru duong' chutho, Waleuru ka Ruoth.
Miyeuru duong' chutho, Waleuru ka Ruoth.

3. Chieng' ma wanabed e Polo, Wanapodhi nyime,
Wanapake gi wer pile, En e Ruodhwa chutho.
Wanapake gi wer pile, En e Ruodhwa chutho.

title: A Nyasacha, Aneno Gik Miwuoro
lyrics:
1. A Nyasacha, aneno gik miwuoro,
Ka tich lweti nyisowa riekoni.
Sulwe gi chieng', gi dwe marieny e Polo,
Tekoni Ruoth ritogi kuonde gi.

Chorus:
Chunya opong' gi wer ka pakoi,
In Nyasacha, tekoni duong'!
Chunya opong' gi wer ka pakoi,
In Nyasacha, herani duong'!

2. Kawuoth' e gwenge duto gin tich lweti,
Chwech duto wer, gi mor ka pakoi,
Gode gi bunge, winy, nam gi aore
Kanenogi nyiso chal tekoni.

3. Kabet kaparo herani Nyasacha,
Ikelo Yesu e ringruok mar piny,
Mond' e ringre okumie richo jogi,
Dhiera hulo tut herani kuoma.

4. Yesu bang' tho, nochier, nodhi e Polo,
Enoduogi oma wabed kode.
Nating' dwonda kapake manyaka chieng',
Kahulo kechne momiya nono.

title: Yesu Kristo, Wuod Nyasaye
lyrics:
1. Yesu Kristo, Wuod Nyasaye,
Chon nobiro konyowa.
En nonyisogi rieko,
En nochango jo matuo.

Chorus:
Yesu Kristo, Wuod Nyasaye,
Onyisowa, onyisowa rieko.
Yesu Kristo, En kend' e Ruoth,
Wanabet nyithinde adier.

2. Yesu Kristo oloyo duto;
En modwaro konyowa,
Mondo wan wawe gi fuwe
Mondo chunywa bed mak.

3. Koro wan wayie Yesu;
Kite long'onwa koro.
Pilepile wanahere,
Wachne wanamak adier.

title: Yesu Jawar, Pakuru
lyrics:
1. Yesu Jawar, Pakuru Jawarwa maduong'!
Herane tut tama hulo duto.
Malaika kod Jomoyie mag piny duto
Hulo duong'ne kod berne kuom joge.
Kaka Jakwath wang'e ni kuom Rombege,
Kuonde duto owuotho kod joge.
Joma geno chamo olembe mag god Zion
Tiyo ni Ruoth ka gi dende kod pak.

2. Yesu Jawar kuom herane notho kuomwa,
Rembe thone nopwodho richona.
Singruok manyien notim kuom rembe gi ringre,
Warruok na chung' e lwanda mak yiengni.
Hera Jawar notimo chir e sandruok,
Teko mar tho nolo e msalaba,
Kondo kudho ka gi jare kendo yanye
Noloyo tho ongima tinende.

3. Yesu Jawar Jadolo en Ruodh Piny duto,
Chwech me Polo pake wer Hosana.
Loch Ruoth Yesu osiko chieng' manyaka chieng'
En noloyo Jachien kod riekone
Mi nyinge duong' e wecheni duto te.
In tho onge wach mopondo kuomi
In okang' mar weyo ringruokni mar piny
Ka arwakora gi ringruok mar Polo.

title: Pakeuru, Un Mong'eye
lyrics:
1. Pakeuru, un mong'eye,
Yesu Kristo ma Jawarwa,
Oseng'iewa, e momiyo
Wahere adier.

2. Nying mabernwa en e Yesu,
En e moritowa pile,
Onge manyalo chandowa
Ka pod wagene.

3. Geneuru ndalo duto,
En adieri mak olokre.
Onge manyalo golowa
E hera mare.

4. Ritwa, Ruoth, mondo wak
Jogi moyiei pile
Nyaka iterwa e Polo;
Wanabed kodi.

5. Ka wabedo ku ma Intie
Wanabedi malony chutho
Gik ma koro pod waremit
Ginibed marwa.

title: Chieng' Moro Ka Polo
lyrics:
1. Chieng' moro ka Polo ne il ahinya,
To piny mwalo richo noketho chuth,
Yesu nobiro monyuole ka dhano,
Mondo obed gi ji modak e piny.

Chorus:
Nohera chutho; nothona e yath;
En nogolo richo mag chunya.
Nochier moloyo tho, mond' ayud gonyruok
Obiro duogo, Jawarna Maduong'.

2. Joricho mag piny nokawo Ruoth Yesu,
Kendo negigure e Yath malit,
Nohinye chuth kendo noting'o wichkuot,
Mondo owarwa wa-ae richo.

3. Chieng' onogo ne gikawegi ike,
Ei bur mokuny mondo oyuwe,
En e geno mar jomaricho duto
Kuom en wayudo warruok maduong'.

4. Burno mane gi ikoe Ruoth Yesu,
Noyawore gi teko mar Nyasaye.
Yesu nochier mane oloyo tho chuth
Koro ongima modak gi joge.

5. Chieng' moro en nowir kendo e pinyni,
Wabiro nene gi duong'ne maler,
Noduog kod joge maler duto chieng'no,
Chieng'no wanamor kwaneno wang' Ruoth.

title: Ok Anawe Pako Nyinge
lyrics:
1. Nikech Nyasaye ogwedha ngang',
Ok anawe pako Nyinge;
Kuom herane maduong' maber,
Ok anawe pako Nyinge.

Chorus:
Ok anawe pako Nyinge,
Jawarna, Jawarna,
Ok anawe pako Nyinge,
Osegwedha adier.

2. Nogolo richona duto,
Ok anawe pako Nyinge;
Dhano machon nogur e Yath,
Ok anawe pako Nyinge.

3. Okonya pile saa mar teo,
Ok anawe pako Nyinge;
To rembe bende pwodha,
Ok anawe pako Nyinge.

4. Otega ndalo duto te,
Ok anawe pako Nyinge.
Otelona e yo maber,
Ok anawe pako Nyinge.

5. Ka pod awuotho e piny
Ok anawe pako Nyinge;
Kendo kotera e polo,
Ok anawe pako Nyinge.

title: Adierani Maduong'
lyrics:
1. Adierani maduong', Nyasaye Wuonwa,
Onge tipo manyalo geng'oi;
Ok ilokri, Ng'uononi ok nyal rem, ngang';
Mana kak' isebet in mosiko.

Chorus:
Adierani maduong', Adierani maduong'.
Pile ka pile kechni ni kuoma.
Gik ma an go lweti em' osechiwo—
Adierani maduong', Nyasaye Wuora.

2. Kinde mag liet gi ng'ich, gi koth kod koyo,
Chieng', dwe gi sulwe kuonde magintie,
Kaachiel gi chwech duto gi hulo duong'ni,
Gi ng'uono kod herani mosiko.

3. Ng'uononi mar weyo richo osiko,
Betni kodwa jiwowa telonwa,
Teko mar kawuono kod geno makiny
Gwethni mogundho chuth isemiya.

title: Tinende Apako Yesu
lyrics:
1. Tinende apako Yesu,
Ayiego e Ruodhwa,
Ok akwero kite kawuono.
Aselokora koro.

Chorus:
Tinende apako Yesu,
Ayiego e Ruodhwa,
Ok akwero kite kawuono.
Aselokora koro.

2. Ayieni In Iduong'
In Inge'yo chunya chuth,
Chon nadagi Wachni madier,
Gik mabeyo ok nadwar.

3. Chon naluwo bang' Satani,
Kodi gik man e yore,
Tinende, Ruoth, aseweyo
Wang'yore ne kod kite.

4. Ok adhi e yori kenda,
Ruoth, Itelona koro,
Gi lweteni matek ngang' ngang
Ndalona duto e piny.

title: Ji Duto Mondo Giwer
lyrics:
1. Oo, ji duto mondo giwer
Ka gipako Jawar, ka gi pako Jawar.
Giduong' mar Nyasachwa kendo Ruoth.
Gilochne mar ng'uono. Gilochne mar ng'uono.
Gilochne mar ng'uono.

2. Ruodha mang'won kendo Nyasacha
Konya mondo aland, konya mondo aland
Aland wachni kuonde duto.
Nyingi mondo yud duong'. Nyingi mondo yud duong'.
Nyingi mondo yud duong'.

3. Yesu e nying magolo luoro,
Magolo luorowa, ma golo luorowa.
En e wer e it jaricho.
Engima kendo kwe. Engima kendo kwe. Engima kendo kwe.

4. Ogolo teko mar richo
Ogonyo ng'at motue, ogonyo ng'at motue.
Rembe ema nyalo luoko richo.
Rembe nochwerona, Rembe nochwerona, Rembe nochwerona.

title: Jathieth Maduong'
lyrics:
1. Jathieth maduong' osudo ka,
En Yesu ma Jakonywa;
Wachne omiyo chunywa mor,
Yaye, winjuru dwonde.

Chorus:
Wer mamit mar jopolo,
Ka gipako Ruoth Yesu,
Nying' moloyo nying duto,
Yesu Kende, Yesu.

2. Oseweyoni richoni,
Winji Yesu kowacho;
Chunyi koro obed gi kuwe,
Kichiko wang'yor Polo.

3. Wadend Nyarombono more
Koro ayie kuom Yesu.
Ahero nying' mar Jawarna
Ahero nyingno, Yesu.

4. Nyingno ogolo richona,
Onge maromo kode;
Chunya mor nade kawinjo,
Nyingno maber mar Yesu.

5. Koduogo chiwo osimbo—
Osimb ngima mar locho—
Eka wanabedi bute,
Wanadend Jawar Yesu.

title: Ahero Pako Yesu Ruoth
lyrics:
1. Ahero pako Yesu Ruoth nikech nowaroa,
Adwaro miye duong' chutho ndalona duto ka,
Ayie chutho kuom rembe moluoko richo ji,
Amor kuom liswane mosetimo e Kalwari.

Chorus:
Yesu oseng'iewowa, Nogolo richowa,
Nosemiyowa ngima, En nowachonwa kama.
Yesu oseng'iewowa, Nogolo richowa,
Nosemiyowa ngima, En nowachonwa kama.

2. Ka ng'ato yie Yesu en odoko ng'a manyien,
Omor kuom tekono mar Ruoth Nyasaye man malo,
Ohero nyiso ji duto kuom liswane adier,
Ma Yesu nosetimoni ji gi ringre owuon.

3. Joma oyie Yesu ok onyalo dhi e mach,
Noting'ogi e luetene ndalogi duto ka,
Satani en e jasikgi otemogi matek,
To Yesu en okonyo jo moiko chunygi chuth.

4. Ndalo moro noomowa gi tung' machien moyuak,
Noterowa e polo kama wanasik kode,
Nomiyowa ringruok manyien nikech nosewacho,
Adwaro neno Yesu Ruodhwa mosewarowa.

title: E Nyingi, Yesu
lyrics:
1. E nyingi, Yesu, wan wayie
To owinjore wapake,
Malaika nochako Nyinge,
Nying'no maber mar Yesu.

Chorus:
Yesu, Yesu mwapako,
Yesu, Nyinge tu duong',
Yesu, wayuakne duto,
Nying' maber mar Yesu.

2. E Nyingi Yesu En kende
E ma nokelonwa ngima,
To nying' moro onge kuom ji
Maber moloyo Yesu.

3. To Weche oremowa ka,
Mondo wahul e malong'o,
To hawine ofwenyore,
Gi Nying' maber mar Yesu.

4. Gi wendeno to en hawi,
E ndalonogo mar Polo,
Gi higini gi higini,
Wawero Nying' mar Yesu.

title: Weruru Wer Mamit
lyrics:
1. Weruru wer ma mit ni Ruoth ma Nyasachwa.
Otimo gik malich miwuoro,
Kendo oselocho gi teko ne maduong',
Pake uru kuwer ne gi mor.

Chorus:
Wapake wadende ni gik mosetimo.
Wanyis ji ber mare gi ritne.
Kendo walame kwa dung'ne gi tik mamit.
Kwa kulore nyime gi Lamo.

2. Weruru Ni Nyasaye kupake gi thumbe,
Adier go uru thumbe mamit.
Ka achiel gi asili kod tunge mayuak
Kukok e nyim Nyasaye ma Ruodhwa.

3. In nam wuo ka achiel gi gik man eiyi
In piny gi ji duto wer uru.
Un nembe madongo paruru kupake
Ungode wer uru kanyakla.

4. Un pewe landuru Wach Maber mar Ruodhwa
Osebiro mondo orit piny.
Obiro rito ogendni duto me piny,
Gibura makare gadiera.

title: Yesu, Isethona
lyrics:
1. Yesu, Isethona, koro aheri,
Kuom tekoni anawe richo duto
Nikech in Jawarna mang'won maduong'
Koro Yesu Kristo aheri adier.

2. Aheri nikech ihera mokwongo
Nyaka iseting'o richona e Yath
Kaka nichandori kuom richo duto
Koro Yesu Kristo aheri adier.

3. Aheri kangima kata anatho
Kendo anapaki ndalo duto ka,
Anaparo pile kuomi, Jawarna,
Koro Yesu Kristo aheri adier.

4. Anamii duong' e ute Polo
Kadhi bedo kodi kuno nyaka chieng',
Ka wer kod osimb ngima mar Ruoth Nyasaye,
Koro Yesu Kristo aheri adier.

title: An Ahero Yesu
lyrics:
1. Ahero winjo Nying Yesu,
Ahero miye duong':
En wenda kod morna pile,
Omitna moloyo.

Chorus:
An ahero Yesu, An ahero Yesu,
An ahero Yesu, nohera mokwongo.

2. Nyingno onyisa kuom hera
Jawar ma nothona,
Rembe e ma nochwerona,
Magolo richona.

3. Onyisa kuom gweth mag Wuora
Momiyowa pile,
Kata awuotho e chandruok,
Lerne orienyna.

4. Nyingno onyisa kuom Jakony
Man koda ndalo duto,
Ka chunya lit ohoyoa,
Omiya mor pile.

title: Ng'wono Mawuoro
lyrics:
1. Ng'wono mawuoro ahinya,
Ma nowara chutho;
Nalal marach, to nonwang'a,
To koro apake.

2. Nopuonja gi ng'wono bende,
Nyaka chunya noyie.
Ne oberna ka naneno
Wach herane kuoma.

3. Kata awuotho e chandruok
Kod tem mathoth mag piny,
Kuom ng'wonone oserita,
Ritne e mageno.

4. Wanapake higni mak rumo
E Polo malo cha,
To pod noremnwa miye duong'
Kaka owinjore.

title: Neuru Ruoth Mar Ruodhi
In Maler Adiera!
Nowara
lyrics:
1. Nowara mi amor kahulo
Nowara gi remb Nyarombo;
Nowara gi ng'wonone maduong'
Koro abet nyathi Nyasaye.

Chorus:
Warruok, warruok!
Nowara gi remb Nyarombo;
Nowara, nowara,
Koro abet nyathi Nyasaye.

2. Amor nikech Yesu nowara,
Onego apake pile;
Lerne orienyna ndalo duto,
En koda ma ok noweya.

3. Aparo kuom Jawarna pile,
Noyie thona mond' owara;
Chunya opong' gi mor ka pake,
Wach herane e mawero.

4. Ang'eyo nanene gi duong'ne
Chieng' ma nobi omo joge;
Otelona kendo orita,
Wachne omiya 'mor pile.

title: Nyingno mar Yesu
lyrics:
1. Nyingno mar Yesu oloyo duto,
Malaika be kata ji duto,
Nyingno mar Yesu waduto wayie,
Waduto wahulo Nyingi Yesu Ruodhwa.

Chorus:
Yesu, Yesu Nyingi ni to nomi duong',
Yesu, Yesu oumowa duto te,
In miderma me Polo,
Kendo joKristo duto,
Yesu, Nyingi ni to ni duong' ngang'.

2. Nyingno mar Yesu malaika wer,
To joKristo duto giwer mamit,
Nyingno mar Yesu e ma wapako,
To wahulo duto Nyingi Yesu Ruodhwa.

3. Nyingno mar Yesu wayudo hawi,
Omiyo chunywa yudo mor chutho,
Nyingno mar Yesu e mwayud' e kwe,
To wahulo duto Nyingi Yesu Ruodhwa.

4. Nyingno mar Yesu oloyo duto,
To wayudoe ngima gi hawi,
Uwinji Yesu en e Jaloyo,
To wahulo duto Nyingi Yesu Ruodhwa.

title: To Mise Mar Kanisa
lyrics:
1. To mise mar Kanisa
En Yesu Kristo Ruoth,
Kanisa nosechuweyo
Gi pi gi wach maler.
Nolor ni mond' olose
Ka miahane maler,
Gi rembe noseng'iewe
Kuom ngimane notho.

2. Ogandane moyiero
Kuom jo modak e piny
Gigeno Kristo kende
Gi yie gi nyuol manyien.
Gipako nying Ruoth Yesu
Gichamo chiemo achiel,
Gigeno gik me Polo
Gi ng'wono kodi ler.

3. Jopinyini wuoro chutho
Kuom chandruokne mapek
Moyudo ei tichne
Kuom puonj mapogore.
To jomaler adieri
Gilemo kendo yuak,
Gichal joma nie mudho
To lergi biro rieny.

4. E chandruok moseyudo
E lwenjege mager
Orito ndalo giko
Gi kuwe ma ok norum.
Ka duong' mar Ruoth nofwenyore
Gibiro il adier,
Kanisa moselocho
Nobed gi mor adier.

5. E piny ka en gi riwruok
Gi Ruoth Nyasaye maduong';
To bende en gi riwruok
Gi ji mobet gi Ruoth.
Wakwayi, Ruoth, Ikonywa
Ni mondo wan ka gin
Wabed mangima kodgi
Kwadak kama intie.

title: Duong' Mar Hekalu Machien
lyrics:
1. Ndalo machon higni mosekadho,
E higa mar ariyo mar loch Ruoth Darius.
Weche mane Ruoth Nyasaye owacho,
Gidho Janabi Hagai emagi.

Chorus:
Chak ur' achaka tich nikech an kodu,
Kendo Roho mara ni kuomu.
Kik uluor awacho kama,
Abiro yiengo polo gi piny kodi nam.
Bende nayieng ogendini duto,
Mi mwandu gi duto nobi ka,
Mi napong' Hekaluni gi duong' maler,
Anie wuon fedha kendo dhahabu.

2. Bende nitie ng'ato modong' kuomu,
Manoneno Hekaluni gi duong' machon,
Kakamano to tind ochal nade?
Donge ochalonu kagi maonge.

3. Nyis Zerubabel, Joshua kod jitee,
Mondo gijiwre gibed motegno kuom Ruoth,
Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo Gik Moko Tee,
An Ruoth Nyasaye emawacho kamano.

4. Duong' ma Hekaluni biro betgo,
Nolo duong' manene engo mokwongo,
An Ruoth Nyasaye Manyalo duto,
Kamano anakel kuwe gi gweth ka.

title: Yesu Jakwadha Mohera
lyrics:
1. Yesu Jakwadha mohera
Okecha ndalo duto.
An ok achando gimoro
Owuotho koda nyaka chieng'.

2. Naweyo yoo nalal marach
To en owuon nodwara.
Noting'a e goke mos komor
Nomor kotera dalane.

3. Kar lek mamit kar pi mokwe
Otera kanyo pile.
Okwayoa oritoa,
Yesu Jakwath mang'won adier.

4. Ka tho nitie ok analuor
Ka Yesu bedo koda.
Ohoyoa osiroa
En kende emotelona.

5. Opedho mesa e nyima.
Kikombena opong' chutho
Achamo chiemb misangoni
Owira gi mo mang'we ng'ar.

6. Otego chunya nyaka chieng'
Ogwedha ndalo duto.
Jakwath maber anadendi
Ei Polo ndalo duto.

title: Awero Kuom Hera Nyasaye
lyrics:
1. Awero kuom hera Nyasaye maduong' manie polo;
Kuom ng'wonone maduong' ahinya nochiwo Wuode Yesu,
Mondo kuom sand kod tho ni jo moyie mag ogendini duto,
Masiche mag chuny kod parruok na aketo ni Yesu Ruoth.

Chorus:
En manotho mochwero rembe
Onge gima nowe ting'o.
Herano mar Yesu Jawarna
Okawo ting'na duto.

2. Awero kuom hera Nyasacha, e godno mar Kalwari,
Opwodho richona, komiyo adoko Nyathi Nyasaye.
Nobiro e piny mondo jomoyie kuome mondo oyudi gweth,
Kar dang'ni mara Ruoth iko yo okawo ting'na duto.

3. Roho mar Nyasaye miya ng'eyo tiend wachne pile pile,
Noloso kar dakne e chunya e teko mar Yesu Ruoth.
Koloko paro dwaro mondo ochal gi Ruodha Yesu,
Kar dak kadhier gi parruok pinyini omiyo amor kuome.

4. Awero mich polo mayudo kuom Yesu ma Jawarna,
Alamo teko polo konya lando wach warruok Yesu,
Mondo giwinj wach warruok mar richo kuom Ruodha Yesu,
Mondo gitony gia e yor tho giwuothi kod Ruodh ngima.

title: Be An Jarit Msalaba?
lyrics:
1. Be an Jarit msalaba?
Japuonjre Ruoth Yesu
Koso naluor hulo nyinge
Kendo ndhogo tichne.

Chorus:
Wanalo temruok
Nyaka watundi ire.
Wanalo temruok
Nyaka wanagow loka.

2. Kik adonji gi yo mayot,
Ma ok akedo lweny.
Kachiwora kata ne tho
Kendo kawachni sira.

3. Be iyie neno masiche
E yo madhi e polo
Pinyni jasik Ng'wono Ruoth
Maketa nyathi Nyasaye.

4. Nyaka akedi luenj jaloch,
Ruoth medna ng'wononi,
Dhier medore, ahiti ger
Elna konyruok e Wachni.

title: An Adwaro Yesu Moloyo
Daheri Moloyo
Winji Luong' mar Ruoth
lyrics:
1. Winji luong' mar Ruoth Yesu,
E piny ka ma kuwe onge,
Wachne obironwa kama,
"In ja-Kristo, bi, luwa."

2. Oluongowa mondo wawe
Dwaro mar gik makadho,
Kodi duto ma ditamwa,
To wahere moloyo.

3. Ndalo mwamor kata mwayuak,
Ka tichwa nobed mathoth,
Pod oluongi ndalo duto:
Mond' wahere moloyo.

4. Yesu oluongowa duto,
Wanawinji duonde,
Watine gi chunywa duto,
Wanahere moloyo.

title: Ang'eyo ni Jawarna Ngima
lyrics:
1. Ang'eyo ni Jawarna ngima,
Kendo chieng' En nowir e piny
En' ochiw ngimane mochwere
Ng'wono kod teko nie lwete.

Chorus:
Ang'eyo chuth ni Yesu ngima,
Kendo chieng' En nowir e piny
Ang'eyo ni ochiwo ngima,
Ng'wono kod teko nie lwete.

2. Gik mosingo duto nochopi,
Singruokne duto ok norem;
Kata gero mar tho nonega,
To chieng' moro nane Jawar.

3. Ang'eyo nolosona kar bet
Kam'odakie nadag kanyo;
En wach maduong' ni Ruoth ohera,
Nodwog e piny mond' ooma.

title: Nool Gweth Maduong'
lyrics:
1. Nool gweth maduong' kuomwa:
En singruok mar herane,
Wanayudi mew mar Nyasaye,
Mamiyowa mor chutho.

Chorus:
Gweth to nomiwa,
Gweth mar chuny e mwachando;
Oronwa gweth momedore
E mwakwayo kawuono.

2. Nool gweth maduong' kuomwa,
Mar jiwo chunywa kendo;
Jo mool kendo matuwo
Giniwinj ni gweth nitie.

3. Nool gweth maduong' kuomwa
Yaye, olnwa koro, Ruoth!
Pong' chunywa gi Roho Maler,
Wachni e moyudi duong'.

4. Nool gweth maduong' kuomwa:
To mond' obinwa koro,
Kwahulo richowa duto,
Ka waluongo Nying Yesu.

5. Nool gweth maduong' kuomwa:
Kwayie kendo winjo
Gima Ruoth osechikowa
Kwatimo dwaro Mare.

title: Nawuoth Kodi Pile
lyrics:
1. Ruodha aheri maradier,
In osiepna madiera,
E wuodha mar piny ma mwalo,
Ok nawe wuotho kodi.
Nawuoth kodi pile. Nawuoth kodi pile.
E wuodha mar piny ma mwalo,
Ok nawe wuotho kodi.

2. Ok nagen mwandu mar pinyni,
Mondo ji omiya luor,
Kata tem birona maduong',
In iwuo niyudo tem.
Nawuoth kodi pile. Nawuoth kodi pile.
Kata tem birona maduong',
In iwuo niyudo tem.

3. Telna e wuodha mar pinyni,
Dhi nyime koda e wuoth,
E dho rangach madhi Polo,
Nadonjie ka an kodi.
Nawuoth kodi pile. Nawuoth kodi pile.
E dho rangach madhi Polo,
Nadonjie ka an kodi.

title: Bedi Matek
lyrics:
1. Bedi matek kuom Ruodhwa Yesu,
Ruakri gi gi lweny mar Nyasaye,
Kituweyo oguchi gadiera,
Law akor en wach makare;
Lam ndalo duto kendo chungi
Kuom tamo Satani pile;
To nilo kuom Yesu Jawarwa,
Nobed kodi kuonde duto.

2. Ked lweny maber kaka jakedo,
Ting' gi lweny duto mar Nyasaye,
Tiendi oik gi wach mireme,
Kaw okumba yie matek chutho,
Ogut konyruok bende momiyi,
Kendo ligangla mar Roho.
To nilo kuom Yesu Jawarwa,
Nobed kodi kuonde duto.

title: Wan Jokedo Pile
lyrics:
1. Wan jokedo pile mag Ruodhwa Yesu,
Tich matek bende ni kuonde duto,
Ok naluor ka an gi Ruoth, anyalo kedo maber,
Ek' anyalo tiyo ni Ruodhwa Yesu.

Chorus:
Kasekedo lueny maber, Kasedoko jaloyo,
Kondo mara bende nayudi e Polo ku,
Teko Ruodhwa nitie nyalo loyowa sigu,
Ek' anyalo tiyo ni Ruodhwa Yesu.

2. Hera bende ni e ranyisi marwa
Mawuotho e wang' yore malong'o,
Adiera e maloyo teko ruoth ma nie mudho,
Ek' anyalo tiyo ni Ruodhwa Yesu.

3. Ok naol, ok anawe kedo maber,
Teko Ruoth bend' e manyalo sira,
Analando wechene kaka nothonwa e Yath,
Ok anawe tiyo ni Ruodhwa Yesu.

4. Yuoruru mondo ukedi kuom Yesu,
Kawuru giu duto te mag lweny,
En e teko mar Roho, gi lamo ndalo duto,
Ek' wanyalo tiyo ni Ruodhwa Yesu.

title: Wuod Nyasaye Odhi Ka Lueny
lyrics:
1. To Wuod Nyasaye odhi ka lueny,
Kuom yudo duong' mar Ruoth:
Bendeche neno ku mabor,
To ng'a maluwo En?
Mamadh' o kikombene,
Koloyo rem malit;
Mating' o Msalapeno,
Adier oluwo En.

2. Jachir machayo kata tho,
Ma chunye ler adier:
Maneno Ruodhe malo cha,
Mokwaye mond' okony.
Koneno rem mar tho malit,
Nosayo kaka en,
Oweyonigi richogi.
Ng'a ma dilue ti?

3. Roho obet kuom jo moyie,
Oganda Yesu Ruoth;
Joote ma jochir adier
Mochayo tong' gi mach.
Ne ok giluoro tho malit,
Rem ok nobuogogi;
Thogi omiwa bet gi chir.
Ng'a ma dilue ti?

4. Ee, jo machuo gi ji mamor,
Oganda Yesu Ruoth;
Gimor nyim kom Jakonywa,
Koruakogi mang'won.
To ne gidonjo Polo kuom
Masira kodi lweny:
Wuon Polo miwa tekoni
Waluwogi kwamor.

title: Achiwo ni Yesu Duto
lyrics:
1. Achiwo ni Yesu duto!
Kata teko ma an go;
Wechena gi timbe duto
Mondo opake pile.

Chorus:
Duto nobed kuom Ruoth Yesu,
Ngimana nobed mare.
Duto nobed kuom Ruoth Yesu,
Ngimana nobed mare.

2. Lueta mond' otim dwarone,
Tienda odhi e yore,
Wang'a none Yesu kende
Dhoga mondo opake.

3. Nateg wang'a kuom Ruoth Yesu,
Kik gimoro oyuwaya
Chunya to nopare pile
Kaka nothona e Yath.

4. Ng'wono maduong' mawuoro
Ka Yesu, ma Ruodh Polo
Oluonga jahera mare,
Omiya yuweyo kuome.

title: Bet ka Yesu
lyrics:
1. Mor mar piny ok nyal yuwaya,
An dabed ka Yesu,
Ber mar pinyini ok notera,
An dabed ka Yesu.

Chorus:
Bet ka Yesu, en wenda,
E kuonde duto pile;
Bedo kaka Ruoth Yesu!
An dabed ka Yesu.

2. Tamruok duto osegolo,
An dabed ka Yesu;
Mond' atine ndalo duto,
An dabed ka Yesu.

3. E yore duto mawuothe,
An dabed ka Yesu;
Kalando wechene pile,
An dabed ka Yesu.

4. Nyaka chieng' matundo ni
An dabed ka Yesu;
Mond' owachna, "In ja-Kristo"
An dabed ka Yesu.

title: Ruoth, Ting'a Malo
lyrics:
1. Areto kawuotho e yo
Madhi malo ndalo duto;
Kalamo pile mondo Ruoth
Oting'a malo moloyo.

Chorus:
Ruoth ting'a malo mond' achung'
Kayie wecheni duto,
Med ting'a malo moloyo,
Abed kapakoi pile.

2. Chunya ok gomb siko e piny
Kama chich gi luoro nitie;
To adwaro loyogi te,
E malami ting'a malo.

3. Adwaro loyo gik me piny
Ma Satani diwuondago;
Nyaka ane mor e Polo;
Genona ni kuomi pile.

4. Adwaro bedo motegno
Nyaka ane mor e Polo;
E momiyo pod alamo,
"Ruoth ting'a malo moloyo."

title: Nyisa Weche Mag Ruoth
lyrics:
1. Nyisa weche mag Ruoth Yesu,
Pidhgi duto e chunya,
Weche mabeyo maloyo
Duto ma wasewinjo.
Nyisa kaka jomalaika
Nowero chieng' mar nyuolne,
Duong' ni Nyasaye man malo,
Mirembe kuom ji duto.

2. Nyis kuom ndalo ma nodhi
E thim ka noriyo kech,
Noteme nikech richowa
To noloyo makare.
Nyis kaka notiyo ni ji
Kod rem ma noting'onwa,
Ne gichaye kendo sande
Kodoko Jawar kuomwa.

3. Nyisa kaka ne gigure
E Yath koting'o richo,
Nyisa liende ma nowuokie
Kochier mong'ima tinde.
Wechego puonja herane
Kochandore nikech wan;
Chunya okuyo kang'eyo
Nothona mondo owara.

title: Kristo ni Kuoma
lyrics:
1. Ndalo moro nalal e richo,
Ler onge e chunya;
E Wach Nyasaye nanwang'o ler,
To Kristo ni kuoma.

Chorus:
Kristo ni kuoma,
Kristo ni kuoma,
Ma e warruok maduong',
Ka Kristo ni kuoma.

2. E kaka ler moa e wang' chieng',
Olodho cham me piny,
Ngima gi hera gi ler oa
Kristo ma ni kuoma.

3. Kaka cham ni e i kodhi,
Yath onyak olembe,
Kama apako Nyasaye madier,
Rohone ni kuoma.

4. Dwaro mar chunya ni koro
Mondo abet ka En,
Kaparo e chunya hononi
Ka Kristo ni kuoma.

title: Ber Uparo Kuom Yesu
lyrics:
1. Kauluor Satani do loyou,
Kobiro pile kendo otemou,
Ber uparo kuom Yesu, ma Jawarwa,
En odwaro konyowa.

Chorus:
Ber uparo kuom Yesu,
Ber uparo kuom Yesu,
En Jawarowa, En oherowa,
Ber uparo kuom Yesu.

2. Ka chunyu ok ohero tich Nyasaye,
Kata ok ohero lame pile,
Ber uparo kuom Yesu, ma Jawarwa,
En odwaro konyowa.

3. Kudwaro yudo Much Nyasaye e chunyu,
Kudwaro mor gi Yesu nyaka chieng',
Ber uparo kuom Yesu, ma Jawarwa,
En odwaro konyowa.

title: Kaw Nying Yesu Kodi
lyrics:
1. Kaw nying Yesu kodi pile,
In mawuotho e piny ka;
Nomiyi mor kodi teko,
Par Nyinge ku midhiye.

Chorus:
Nyinge ber, Nyinge mit!
Nyingeno e genowa;
Nyinge ber, Nyinge mit!
En Yesu mowarowa.

2. Kaw nying Yesu kodi pile,
En nobed kuot mariti:
Ka tem kod richo obiro,
Lam e Nyingeno maler.

3. Ee, nyingno maber mar Yesu,
Okelo mor e chunywa;
Ka En oruakwa e Polo,
Wanawer kuom nying Yesu.

4. Koro wadendo nying Yesu,
Kwa lame, owinjowa.
Ruoth moloyo ruodhi duto,
En Yesu, ma Jawarwa.

title: Kwawuotho gi Ruodhwa
lyrics:
1. Kwawuotho gi Ruodhwa
E ler mar Wechene,
Mor maduong' momiyowa ka!
Kwatimoni Nyasaye
Gik modwaro duto,
Enogwedhwa gi hawi mare.

Chorus:
Yie gi tim;
Olong'o ni Nyasaye
Okelo mor e chunywa,
Kwageno kuom Yesu.

2. Ok wanyalo bedo
E mudho mar jo-piny
Nikech hera mar Yesu kuomwa.
Ok wayie koro
Kuom lisweche moko.
Wayie remb Yesu kende.

3. Onge tuo moro,
Kata tho manyalo
Geng'owa kuom hera mar Yesu.
Nikech Yesu nochier,
Wan bende moyie,
Wabiro bedo kode kuno.

4. Wan gi lalruok maber
Kod Yesu Jawarwa,
Gi lamo kuom Roho mar Nyasaye.
Kwachiwore kuome,
Kendo dok jo-tichne
Nopong' chunywa gi mor maduong'.

title: Ka Tho Gi Yesu
lyrics:
1. Ka tho gi Yesu, kuom tho En mara;
Ka ngima kode, en ngima manyien,
Ka ng'iyo Yesu duong'ne neno,
Pile ka pile, Ruodha, an mari.

Chorus:
Pile ka pile orita maber,
Pile to ngimana ni mar Yesu;
Ka ng'iyo Yesu duong'ne neno;
Pile ka pile, Ruodha, an mari.

2. Onge dhier moro ka Yesu nitie,
Onge ting' mapek mak nowe ting'o,
Ok aneno kuyo ka En koda,
Pile ka pile Yesu orita.

3. Ka chunya lit, to kata chunya pek,
Ka pi wang' owuok, ka chur e iya,
Ka temruok biro, anyalo loyo,
Pile ka pile Yesu opara.

4. Ka nyawo nitie, En e mong'eyo,
Tuwowa duto onyalo chango;
Pile ka pile e weche duto,
Yesu, Jawarna, e ma ni koda.

title: Opando Chunya
lyrics:
1. Ruoth Yesu Kristo e Jawar maduong',
Jawar maber chutho kuoma,
Nochiwo ngimane mondo owara,
Herane e moritago.

Chorus:
Opando chunya e lwanda morita,
Momiya abedo maber;
Opando chunya e tut mar herane
Ouma gi luete mang'won,
Ouma gi luete mang'won.

2. Ruoth Yesu Kristo e Jawar maduong',
Ogolna gi mapek kuoma,
Orita mondo kik achwanyra ngang',
Omiya tekone pile.

3. Omiya gweth mathoth pile ka pile
Mopong'a gi morne chutho,
Mapake gi wer gi ilo mag chuny,
Amor gi Jakonyna chutho.

4. Chieng' moro notera kadhi e Polo
Nabedi kode nyaka chieng'
Kod joge ma noa e pinje duto
Napake malong'o chutho.

title: Winjuru Duond Yesu
lyrics:
1. Winjuru duond Yesu Kristo,
Ruodha maber ni e Yesu,
Winjuru Jakonywa Yesu,
En oluongwa, luongwa, waluwe.

Chorus:
Analruo bang'i, Yesu,
Analruo bang'i, Yesu,
Analruo bang'i, Yesu,
En noriti, riti chunya.

2. Biuru unune yora,
Yoranogo e malong'o,
Luewuru yoranogo,
Ma utundi ira un duto.

3. Yoranogo e yo madiny,
Mochiko tir chutho pile,
Yoranogo odhi malo,
Ndalo duto nyaka e pinyni.

4. Yora en e yo mar ngima,
Yora en yo mar mor chutho.
Mor ma ok norum kendo ngang'
To nosiki kodwa e Polo.

title: Asebayo E Yo Mabor
lyrics:
1. Asebayo e yo mabor
Kuom Ruodhwa Nyasaye.
Chunya nopong' gi tim richo,
Weya koro, Ruoth.

Chorus:
Abiro koro, Ruoth,
Kik aba kendo,
Kuom ng'wononi abiro ni
Yesu, Jawarna.

2. Naketho e nyimi mathoth,
Luoka koro, Ruoth,
Kalokora gi chuny malit;
Luoka koro, Ruoth.

3. Koro aol gi richona,
Luoka gi rembi,
Ka geno herani kuoma,
Abiro iri.

4. Chunya lit nikech kethona,
Abiro iri.
Medna teko kod genoi,
Puodha koro, Ruoth.

title: Wakedo gi Satani
lyrics:
1. Wakedo gi Satani kodi joge maricho,
Yesu Kristo en e Ruodhwa, motelonwa yo maber,
Wadwaro luwo bang'e ndalowa duto e piny ka,
Yesu Jawarowa.

Chorus:
Wan wawero Haleluya,
Duong' Nyasachwa e mosiko,
Wan wawero Haleluya,
Yesu otelonwa.

2. Ok wanyalo lokoji kodi bunde kata luth,
To wanyalo loko ji mana gi Wach gi Much Nyasaye.
Ji ginyalo yudo ngima mana ka gilokore,
Yesu, Jawarowa.

3. Kwakedo kak'onyisowa, wanyalo loyo en;
Kwalamo pile pile kodi somo Wach mar Ngima,
Wanadok matek kuom kedo pile ka konyisowa,
Yesu otelonwa.

4. Adwaro pako Yesu nikech nosewaro ji,
Adwaro pako Ruoth Yesu nikech nosegonyo ji,
Adwaro pako Yesu nikech nosemiyo ji mor,
Yesu Jawarowa.

title: Keduru Jo Ka Yesu
Ende Wadhiuruwa
An Amor E Tich Ruoth
lyrics:
1. An amor ahinya e tich Ruoth Yesu,
Opong'o chunya gi ilo;
Omiya mor ma tich moro ok dikel,
Kaka mar Ruodha Yesu.

Chorus:
E tich mar Ruodha Yesu,
Achiworane chutho;
Omiya kuwe gi mor gi gweth
E tich mar Ruodha Yesu.

2. An amor ahinya e tich Ruoth Yesu,
Opong'o chunya gi ilo;
Kata tek manadi pod awer pile
E tich mar Ruodha Yesu.

3. An amor ahinya e tich Ruoth Yesu,
Opong'o chunya gi ilo;
Adwaro luwe kuonde motelona
E tich mar Ruodha Yesu.

4. An amor ahinya e tich Ruoth Yesu,
Opong'o chunya gi ilo;
Giga duto ma ango achiwone
Kuom tich mar Ruodha Yesu.

title: Nyasaye Obedo Misiro
lyrics:
1. Nyasaye obedo misiro marwa,
En oik maber chutho ni wan;
Nikech ka kuyo kodi kuyo obironwa,
Nyasaye oritowa.
Nyasaye en Jawar, En oherowa,
Teko duto oseketo kuom Wuode Yesu;
Wayie kendo pakon’ nyinge pile,
Nikech Nyasaye oritowa.

2. Kata pinje duto osebwanyoni,
Godni duto dhumo e nam mathoth,
Ok naluoro nikech Nyasachwa nitie,
Nyasaye oritowa.
Nyasaye en Jawar, En oherowa,
Teko duto oseketo kuom Wuode Yesu;
Wayie kendo pakon’ nyinge pile,
Nikech Nyasaye oritowa.

3. Pi mar dho nam mool mos maduong’ kanyo,
Okelo mor e dalane maler,
Piny kama Nyasaye motelonie ji,
Nyasaye oritowa.
Nyasaye en Jawar, En oherowa,
Teko duto oseketo kuom Wuode Yesu;
Wayie kendo pakon’ nyinge pile,
Nikech Nyasaye oritowa.

title: Oikona Kar Dak
lyrics:
1. Oikona kar dak maler e Polo,
Kar dakno mor maduong’ duto iye,
Ok amor kuom mor mar piny ma siki,
Adwaro dak gi Yesu dalo duto.

Chorus:
Oikona kar dak maler e Polo,
Adwaro dakie ndalo duto;
Oikona kar dak maler e Polo,
Adwaro dakie ndalo duto.

2. Msalaba mar Yesu obuo piny duto,
Herane opong’o chunywa duto te,
Herano e maditami warruok,
Adwaro bet gi Yesu ndalo duto.

3. Kuyo bende ok nyale ngang’e Polo,
Yuak duto Ruoth ogolo duto te,
Kuyo ma tinde wan go e pinyni,
No rum chieng’ moro mwadago e Polo.

4. Jo madakie gin joma ler ahinya,
Jogego nosepwodhgi gi rembe,
Wer mosepako Yesu Motelogi,
Nanane bende kanyo ndalo duto.

title: Wuo koda Ruoth
lyrics:
1. Wuo koda Ruoth adieri,
Ruodha ma tinde aheri,
Lueta kawuotho gi lwenyni,
Polo e dalwa maduong’.
Wer malich wer maduong’ chutho,
Wer mapako Ruoth Yesu,
Mond’ apidie chuny lando,
Wachni kuom weche mathoth.

Chorus:
Wuo koda Ruoth pile,
Wuo koda Ruoth pile,
Nyisa malong’o,
“In e mawara adier.”

2. Ruak ranyisi tich koda,
Yie med e chunya pile,
Mond’ apak Nyingi e Polo,
Tich e piny kadho kedi.
In e Jawar motelona,
Wachni e ler maradier,
Naneno duong’ni maler chuth,
Kapakoi pile kanyo.

3. Ruoth luong’a ndalo duto te,
Tienda odiri maber chuth,
Kawuotho dhi Polo dalo,
Wer mawero mor chutho.
Amor gi heri pile, Ruoth,
In In Jawarna maduong’,
Lerne orieny e chuny more,
Duto mar piny orumo.

title: Nawuoth kodi Ruoth
lyrics:
1. Nawuoth kodi, Ruoth, kapaki pile,
Anadagi e lwenji k Ked maber.
In Jakonyna Ruoth motelona,
Anawuoth kodi, Ruoth, pile.

Chorus:
Ruoth kikawe piny, Anawuoth kodi,
Anawuoth kodi, Ruoth, ndalo duto;
In Jakonyna ma motelona,
Anawuoth kodi, Ruoth, pile.

2. Nawuoth kodi, Ruoth, amor gi Wachni,
Anadagi gi hera pile pile.
In Jakonyna Ruoth motelona,
Anawuoth kodi, Ruoth, pile.

3. Nawuoth kodi, Ruoth, ndalo wuodhani,
Anadagi e heri nyaka chieng’.
In Jakonyna Ruoth motelona,
Anawuoth kodi, Ruoth, pile.

title: Amor Kang’eyo
lyrics:
1. Amor kang’eyo ni Wuonwa man malo
Onyisnwa herane nie Wachne;
Gik mabeyo mathoth enyisowa te,
To hera duto e mar Yesu Krists.

Chorus:
Amor ahinya kang’eyno ohera,
Yesu ohera, Yesu ohera;
Amor ahinya kang’eyno ohera,
Yesu ohera adier.

2. Kata ayuag nikech richo matora,
Yesu ohera kendo owerowa;
Kar lalruok mara koting’ona rem,
Herane omiya abedo maber.

3. Yesu ohera kendo an ahere,
Hera e manyalo riwowa mara;
Nolor ni piny mondo En owara,
Ahero pako nying Yesu Krists.

4. Ka moro owuondwa ni mor daka kwayo,
Parruok mar hera mar Yesu Krists,
Noloyo teko mara kadi Polo,
E moro manie chunya pile.

title: Yesu Jatelona
lyrics:
1. Yesu Jatelona, moradagi,
Nalueri kenda e piny ka;
Ka lueta ni ka lweti kanyo,
An amor kendo anyalo wuotho.
Yesu Jakonya ma motelona,
Ok analueri lwenji mager;
An amor maber chutho kang’eyo,
An amor kendo anyalo wuotho.

2. Ka amulo ler mar herane,
Gik duto maradier anwang’o;
Gino more e mapongo chunywa,
An amor kendo anyalo wuotho.
Yesu Jakonya ma motelona,
Ok analueri lwenji mager;
An amor maber chutho kang’eyo,
An amor kendo anyalo wuotho.

3. Chieng’ moro nanene gi duong’ne,
Kapako Nyinge kendo dende;
Nawer ne kanyo ndalo duto,
An amor kendo anyalo wuotho.
Yesu Jakonya ma motelona,
Ok analueri lwenji mager;
An amor maber chutho kang’eyo,
An amor kendo anyalo wuotho.

title: Lando hera
lyrics:
1. Lando hera maduong’ mar Ruodhwa,
Wawer Haleluya.
Lando hera maduong’ mar Ruodhwa,
Wawer Haleluya.

Chorus:
Weruru Haleluya,
Weruru Haleluya;
Weruru Haleluya,
Haleluya, Haleluya.

2. Wang’eyo chuth ni Ruoth oherowa,
Wawer Haleluya.
Wang’eyo chuth ni Ruoth oherowa,
Wawer Haleluya.

3. Werburu kowinja duonde maber,
Wawer Haleluya.
Werburu kowinja duonde maber,
Wawer Haleluya.

4. Mor maduong’ opong’a e chunya ka tindo,
Wawer Haleluya.
Mor maduong’ opong’a e chunya ka tindo,
Wawer Haleluya.

title: Yesu oluongi
lyrics:
1. Yesu oluongi, luong’i kawuono,
Donge iwinjo duonde mang’won?
Yesu oluong’i, luong’i kawuono,
Mondo itony e richoni.

Chorus:
Biiri kawuono, biiri kawuono,
Lamo koro kik itue.
Yesu oluong’i, luong’i kawuono,
Mondo itony e richoni.

2. Yesu oluong’i, luong’i kawuono,
Nikech nose tho e Yath kowari,
Lerne opong’a e wang’ yore me piny,
Mondo itony e richoni.

3. Biiri kawuono kikawe lero,
Satani dalo donge owuondi?
Yesu oluong’i, luong’i kawuono,
Mondo itony e richoni.

4. Biiri kawuono, biiri kawuono,
Ng’wono mar Nyasaye donge imany?
Yesu oluong’i, luong’i kawuono,
Mondo itony e richoni.

title: In ng’a ma ni dhoodi kanyo?
lyrics:
1. In ng’a ma ni dhoodi kanyo?
In ng’a ma yuacho higni mathoth?
Ochung’e e dhoodi kogur’ iye,
In pod idage imiyo odar?

Chorus:
Donge iwinjo duonde?
Oluong’i maber kondo.
Biiri ire, Wuod Nyasaye,
En Jawara adier.

2. Kristo oluok liete gi rembe,
Kendo nosande nikech wan duto,
Biiri ire koro iwerne,
En Jawarna maduong’ adier.

3. Be inachung’ ma ok iyueye?
Kandhieri kodo e dhoodi kuno,
Lorne orieny moriti e chunya,
Lorne maber manie Wachne.

title: Laler
lyrics:
1. Laler mar hera mowuokie Wachne,
Ler maber e motelonwa yo;
Ndalo duto tichwa none kanyo,
Ka waluwe pile ka pile.

Chorus:
Laler mar hera, Laler mar hera,
Ler maber e motelonwa yo;
Laler mar hera, Laler mar hera,
Ler maber e motelonwa yo.

2. Laler mar hera mawinjie herane,
Wer mamit e mawerogo pile;
Kuyo mar piny koro wasegolo,
Nikech Ruodhwa Yesu ohera.

3. Laler mar hera mawerogo kuno,
Mor maduong’ e motelonwa Polo;
Wayudo gweth duto momiwa te,
Ka Ruodhwa Yesu oherowa.

title: Yesu Kristo ohera
lyrics:
1. Yesu Kristo ohera, hera ma tinde omiya nanga,
Herano ok norum nyaka chieng’.
Opong’o chunya gi mor, herane e ma motelona,
Yesu Kristo ohera adier.

Chorus:
Yesu ohera, Yesu ohera,
Herano ok norum nyaka chieng’.
Opong’o chunya gi mor, herane e ma motelona,
Yesu Kristo ohera adier.

2. Ka richo osetora, herane e mopwodha chutho,
Herano ok norum nyaka chieng’.
Amor gi warruokne, herane e ma motelona,
Yesu Kristo ohera adier.

3. Chieng’ moro nanene, herane e ma nopaki kuno,
Herano ok norum nyaka chieng’.
Nanane gi duong’ne, herane e ma motelona,
Yesu Kristo ohera adier.

title: Biiri ire
lyrics:
1. Biiri ire koro kik iter,
Luong’ mar hera dhoodi donge nitie?
Yesu oluong’i, biiri mondo owari,
En Jawara adier.

Chorus:
Biiri maber tindi,
Biiri ire tindi,
Luong’ mar hera dhoodi donge nitie?
En Jawara adier.

2. Yesu oik gweth mathoth ni wan duto,
Ng’wono kodi warruok donge nitie?
Biiri ire, Wuod Nyasaye, mond’ owari,
En Jawara adier.

3. Biiri ire koro iwerne,
Wer mar warruok dhoodi donge nitie?
Yesu oluong’i, biiri mondo owari,
En Jawara adier.

title: Ruoth oyuak kowuonwa
lyrics:
1. Ruoth oyuak kowuonwa ndalo duto,
En ohera ohero konyowa maber.
Donge wawuo kodo pile e lamo,
Mondo wagwethne ndalo duto?

Chorus:
Ruoth oherowa, Ruoth oherowa,
En Jawarwa motelonwa maber.
Ruoth oherowa, Ruoth oherowa,
En Jawarwa motelonwa adier.

2. Ruoth oyuak kowuonwa chieng’ mar sandne,
E Yath mar tho ne nosande nikech wan.
Donge wawuo kodo pile e lamo,
Mondo wagwethne ndalo duto?

3. Ruoth oyuak kowuonwa ka wadakie,
Chieng’ moro notera kanyo e Polo.
Donge wawuo kodo pile e lamo,
Mondo wagwethne ndalo duto?

title: Sande mathoth
lyrics:
1. Sande mathoth ne nosande Ruoth Yesu,
Nosande kendo nodhier e piny ka;
Nosande duto nikech richowa te,
Yesu Kristo Jawarwa.

Chorus:
Yesu oherowa, Yesu oherowa,
En Jawarwa motelonwa maber.
Yesu oherowa, Yesu oherowa,
En Jawarwa motelonwa adier.

2. Nodhier kendo nosanore Wuod Nyasaye,
Nikech richo marwa omiyo notho;
Warruok maduong’ e motelonwa tinde,
Yesu Kristo Jawarwa.

3. Chieng’ moro nanene kanyie gi duong’ne,
Nasoma Wachne ndalo wuodhani;
En Jakonyna Ruoth motelona maber,
Yesu Kristo Jawarwa.

title: En tielo e dhoodi
lyrics:
1. En tielo e dhoodi konyisi warruok,
Biiri ire mondo itony chutho;
Luong’ mar hera dhoodi donge nitie koro,
Yesu oluong’i adier.

Chorus:
En tielo, En tielo dhoodi,
Biiri ire mondo itony chutho;
Luong’ mar hera dhoodi donge nitie koro,
Yesu oluong’i adier.

2. En tielo e dhoodi konyisi warruok,
Ka richo osetora donge iwinj?
Luong’ mar hera dhoodi donge nitie koro,
Yesu oluong’i adier.

3. En tielo e dhoodi konyisi warruok,
Biiri ire kodo iwerne koro;
Luong’ mar hera dhoodi donge nitie koro,
Yesu oluong’i adier.

title: Ndalo machon
lyrics:
1. Ndalo machon Ruoth Yesu nosande e pinyni,
Nosande kendo nodhier e Yath nikech wan;
Noluok kendo nosepwuodh duto mar richowa,
Yesu Kristo Jawara.

Chorus:
Haleluya pako Ruoth,
Haleluya pako Ruoth;
Yesu oikona maber e Polo kuno,
Haleluya pako Ruoth.

2. Nodhier kendo nosanore Wuod Nyasaye maduong’,
Nikech richo marwa omiyo notho e Yath;
Warruok maduong’ e motelonwa ndalo duto,
Yesu Kristo Jawara.

3. Chieng’ moro nanene kanyie gi duong’ne,
Nasoma Wachne maber ndalo wuodhani;
Yesu Kristo Jawarna e motelona,
Haleluya pako Ruoth.

title: Weruru Haleluya
lyrics:
1. Weruru Haleluya pako Ruoth Yesu Kristo,
En Jawara adier ohera maber chutho;
Orita ndalo duto nyaka e wuodha mar piny,
Yesu Kristo ohera.

Chorus:
Weruru Haleluya pako Ruoth,
Haleluya pako Ruoth;
Orita ndalo duto nyaka e wuodha mar piny,
Yesu Kristo ohera.

2. Ka amulo ler mar herane Wach maradier anwang’o,
Gik mabeyo mathoth enyisowa te e Wachne;
Warruok maduong’ e motelonwa ndalo duto,
Yesu Kristo Jawara.

3. Chieng’ moro nanene kanyie gi duong’ ne koro,
Nanene gi mor chutho e Polo nyaka chieng’;
Nanane kendo nanwer ne wer mamit ahinya,
Haleluya pako Ruoth.

title: Ahero siko gi Yesu
lyrics:
1. Ahero siko gi Yesu Kristo ndalo duto,
En ohera ohero konyowa maber chutho;
Donge wawuo kodo pile e lamo koro,
Mondo wagwethne ndalo duto?

Chorus:
Ruoth oherowa, Ruoth oherowa,
En Jawarwa motelonwa maber chutho.
Ruoth oherowa, Ruoth oherowa,
En Jawarwa motelonwa adier.

2. Orita ndalo duto nyaka e wuodha mar piny,
Amor kang’eyo ni Wuonwa motelonwa tinde;
Herane opong’o chunywa duto te koro,
Yesu Kristo Jawara.

3. Chieng’ moro nanene kanyie gi duong’ne,
Kapako Nyinge kendo dende kanyo e Polo;
En Jakonyna Ruoth motelona maber,
Yesu Kristo Jawara.

title: Yesu oluongi biiri
lyrics:
1. Yesu oluongi biiri koro kik iter,
Luong’ mar hera dhoodi donge nitie koro?
Yesu oluong’i, biiri mondo owari,
En Jawara adier.

Chorus:
Biiri maber tindi,
Biiri ire tindi,
Luong’ mar hera dhoodi donge nitie koro?
En Jawara adier.

2. Yesu oik gweth mathoth ni wan duto,
Ng’wono kodi warruok donge nitie koro?
Biiri ire, Wuod Nyasaye mondo owari tindi,
En Jawara adier.

3. Biiri ire koro iwer ne dalo duto,
Wer mar warruok dhoodi donge nitie koro?
Yesu oluong’i, biiri mondo owari,
En Jawara adier.

title: Ka iwinjo duond Nyasaye
lyrics:
1. Ka iwinjo duond Nyasaye konyisi maber,
Biiri ire mondo itony chutho kawuono;
Luong’ mar hera dhoodi donge nitie tinde,
Yesu oluong’i adier.

Chorus:
En tielo, En tielo dhoodi,
Biiri ire mondo itony chutho tinde;
Luong’ mar hera dhoodi donge nitie tinde,
Yesu oluong’i adier.

2. Ka richo osetora donge iwinj kawuono?
Luong’ mar hera dhoodi donge nitie tinde,
Yesu oluong’i, biiri mond’ owari,
En Jawara adier.

3. Biiri ire kodo iwer ne dalo duto,
Luong’ mar hera dhoodi donge nitie tinde,
Yesu oluong’i, biiri mondo owari,
En Jawara adier.

title: Piny kodo chuny
lyrics:
1. Piny kodo chuny gi lweny maradier tinde,
Jo moyie duto gikedo kanyo pile;
Wan wakedo gi Satani koro i lweny,
Yesu otelonwa ndalo duto.

Chorus:
Haleluya pako Ruoth,
Haleluya pako Ruoth;
Yesu oikona maber e Polo koro,
Haleluya pako Ruoth.

2. Warruok maduong’ e motelonwa e piny ka tinde,
Gik mabeyo mathoth enyisowa te koro;
Wayudo gweth duto momiwa te koro,
Yesu Kristo ohera.

3. Nanene kendo nasoma Wachne ndalo wuodhani,
En Jakonyna Ruoth motelona maber chutho;
Hera duto e motelonwa e Polo kuno,
Haleluya pako Ruoth.

title: Ruoth ohera
lyrics:
1. Ruoth ohera kendo an ahere,
Hera e manyalo riwowa mara;
Nolor ni piny mondo En owara,
Ahero pako Nying Yesu Kristo.

Chorus:
Yesu oherowa, Yesu oherowa,
En Jawarwa motelonwa maber chutho.
Ruoth oherowa, Ruoth oherowa,
En Jawarwa motelonwa adier.

2. Ka richo osetora donge iwinj kawuono?
Herane opong’o chunywa duto te koro;
En Jakonyna Ruoth motelona maber,
Yesu Kristo Jawara.

3. Chieng’ moro nanene kanyie gi duong’ne,
Kapako Nyinge kendo dende kanyo e Polo;
En Jakonyna Ruoth motelona maber,
Yesu Kristo Jawara.

title: Pako Nying Yesu
lyrics:
1. Pako Nying Yesu oherowa maber,
Orita ndalo duto nyaka e wuodha mar piny;
Wayudo mor maduong’ tich moro ok dikel,
Yesu Kristo Jawara.

Chorus:
Weruru Haleluya pako Ruoth,
Haleluya pako Ruoth;
Orita ndalo duto nyaka e wuodha mar piny,
Yesu Kristo ohera.

2. Ka amulo ler mar herane Wach maradier anwang’o,
Gik mabeyo mathoth enyisowa te koro;
Wayudo gweth duto momiwa te koro,
Yesu Kristo ohera.

3. Chieng’ moro nanene kanyie gi duong’ne,
Kapako Nyinge kendo dende kanyo e Polo;
En Jakonyna Ruoth motelona maber,
Yesu Kristo Jawara.

title: Jawarna ohera
lyrics:
1. Jawarna ohera, herano ok norum nyaka chieng’,
Opong’o chunya gi mor, herane e ma motelona;
Yesu Kristo ohera adier.

Chorus:
Yesu ohera, Yesu ohera,
Herano ok norum nyaka chieng’.
Opong’o chunya gi mor, herane e ma motelona,
Yesu Kristo ohera adier.

2. Ka amulo ler mar herane Wach maradier anwang’o,
Herane opong’a e wang’ yore me piny koro;
En Jakonyna Ruoth motelona maber,
Yesu Kristo Jawara.

3. Chieng’ moro nanene gi duong’ne kanyo e Polo,
Nasoma Wachne maber ndalo wuodhani;
En Jakonyna Ruoth motelona maber,
Yesu Kristo Jawara.

title: Yesu Ruodha ohera
lyrics:
1. Yesu Ruodha ohera hera ma tinde omiya nanga,
Herano ok norum nyaka chieng’.
Opong’o chunya gi mor, herane e ma motelona,
Yesu Kristo ohera adier.

Chorus:
Yesu ohera, Yesu ohera,
Herano ok norum nyaka chieng’.
Opong’o chunya gi mor, herane e ma motelona,
Yesu Kristo ohera adier.

2. Ka richo osetora herane e mopwodha chutho,
Herano ok norum nyaka chieng’ koro;
Amor gi warruokne, herane e ma motelona,
Yesu Kristo ohera adier.

3. Chieng’ moro nanene gi duong’ne kanyo e Polo,
Nanene gi mor chutho e Polo nyaka chieng’;
Nanane kendo nanwer ne wer mamit ahinya,
Haleluya pako Ruoth.

title: Jawarna maduong’
lyrics:
1. Jawarna maduong’ ohera maber chutho,
Orita ndalo duto nyaka e wuodha mar piny;
Wayudo mor maduong’ tich moro ok dikel,
Yesu Kristo Jawara.

Chorus:
Haleluya pako Ruoth,
Haleluya pako Ruoth;
Yesu oikona maber e Polo koro,
Haleluya pako Ruoth.

2. Ka amulo ler mar herane Wach maradier anwang’o,
Gik mabeyo mathoth enyisowa te e Wachne;
Wayudo gweth duto momiwa te koro,
Yesu Kristo Jawara.

3. Chieng’ moro nanene kanyie gi duong’ne koro,
Nasoma Wachne maber ndalo wuodhani;
En Jakonyna Ruoth motelona maber,
Yesu Kristo Jawara.

title: Nyasaye ohera
lyrics:
1. Nyasaye ohera kendo an ahere,
Hera e manyalo riwowa mara;
Nolor ni piny mondo En owara,
Ahero pako Nying Yesu Kristo.

Chorus:
Ruoth oherowa, Ruoth oherowa,
En Jawarwa motelonwa maber chutho.
Ruoth oherowa, Ruoth oherowa,
En Jawarwa motelonwa adier.

2. Ka richo osetora donge iwinj kawuono?
Herane opong’o chunywa duto te koro;
En Jakonyna Ruoth motelona maber,
